name: Counterintelligence Unit
description: Specialized unit dedicated to detecting, neutralizing, and exploiting enemy espionage operations. Conducts mole hunts, double-agent operations, and deception campaigns to protect national secrets.

specialAbilities.name: Mole Hunt
specialAbilities.description: Systematic investigation to identify and neutralize enemy agents who have penetrated friendly intelligence services.

specialAbilities.name: Double Agent Operations
specialAbilities.description: Turns captured enemy agents to feed disinformation back to their handlers, deceiving enemy intelligence.
